title: cenchrus divisus
intro: Cenchrus divisus, also known as the buffelgrass or desert grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Africa and parts of Asia. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cenchrus divisus include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy for human consumption.
